title: Oscar Success for Mike Hill - Warrington's Oscar Winner
text: Mike Hill from Warrington won the Oscar for Best Makeup and Hairstyling alongside Jordan Samuel and Cliona Furey for Frankenstein at the 2026 Academy Awards ceremony held in March. Hill previously won a BAFTA in the same category in February. The makeup work on Frankenstein was particularly impressive, featuring a full body makeup consisting of 42 pieces, with the makeup broken up along actual cuts and stitches where Frankenstein put the creature together like a jigsaw puzzle. Jacob Elordi, who played the creature, reported that the whole makeup process took nine to eleven hours each day. Hill's meticulous prosthetics work created a creature design that showcased exceptional artistry in transforming the actor while maintaining emotional depth and realism.
